name: MDN — Array.prototype.flatMap signature lookup
goal:
Open https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Array/flatMap and find:
  1. The return type of Array.prototype.flatMap (always 'A new array' or 'Array')
  2. The function signature line

Return ONLY a JSON object with EXACTLY these keys:
  - "returnType": a string containing the word 'Array' (the function's return type description)
  - "signature": a string containing 'flatMap' (the syntax line, e.g. 'flatMap(callbackFn)' or 'flatMap(callbackFn, thisArg)')

Example correct output:
  {"returnType": "A new Array with each element being the result of the callback function and flattened by a depth of 1", "signature": "flatMap(callbackFn)"}

Do not include any extra fields. Complete with EXACTLY this JSON object as your final result.
